zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Eames於大約1629年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特時，他的父親Captain Anthony Eames36歲，母親Margery32歲。他於1651年與Elizabeth Andrews在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1712年7月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Eames于大约1629年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特时，他的父亲Captain Anthony Eames36岁，母亲Margery32岁。他于1651年与Elizabeth Andrews在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1712年7月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eames
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English eme, eim ‘uncle’ (Old English ēam). Most of the modern variants of the surname have post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Eames was born about 1629, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Captain Anthony Eames, was 36 and his mother, Margery, was 32. He married Elizabeth Andrews in 1651, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 30 July 1712, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Eames est né environ 1629, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Captain Anthony Eames, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Andrews en 1651, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1712, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Eames um 1629 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Captain Anthony Eames 36 und seine Mutter Margery 32. Er hat 1651 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Andrews geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1712 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Eames è nato il circa 1629 nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Captain Anthony Eames, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margery, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Andrews nel 1651, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1712, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Eamesが約1629年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで生まれた時，父Captain Anthony Eamesは36歳，母Margeryは32歳であった。1651年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでElizabeth Andrewsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1712年7月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Eames(이)가 대략 1629년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Captain Anthony Eames(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1651년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Elizabeth Andrews(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1712년 7월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Eames nasceu aproximadamente 1629, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Captain Anthony Eames, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Andrews em 1651, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1712, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Eames родился около 1629 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Captain Anthony Eames было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Andrews в 1651 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 30 июля 1712 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Eames nació aproximadamente 1629, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Captain Anthony Eames, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margery, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Andrews en 1651, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de julio de 1712, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 84 años.
